mapper.select: SELECT A.CONCERT_NO AS concertNo , A.ARTIST_NM_KOR AS artistNmKor , A.ARTIST_NM_FOR AS artistNmFor , A.CONCERT_YEAR AS concertYear , A.CONCERT_MONTH AS concertMonth , A.CONCERT_DATE AS concertDate , A.CONCERT_TIME AS concertTime , A.VENUE AS venue , A.TCT_SITE AS tctSite , A.TCT_OPEN_AT AS tctOpenAt , A.EMAIL_YN AS emailYn , A.POP_SCORE AS popScore , A.REG_TIME AS regTime , B.SEND_YN AS sendYn FROM TB_CONCERT_INFO AS A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_ARTIST_MSG AS B ON A.ARTIST_NM_KOR = B.ARTIST_NM_KOR AND A.CONCERT_YEAR = B.CONCERT_YEAR AND A.CONCERT_MONTH = B.CONCERT_MONTH AND A.CONCERT_DATE = B.CONCERT_DATE WHERE CONCAT(A.CONCERT_YEAR, '-', LPAD(A.CONCERT_MONTH, 2, '0')) BETWEEN CONCAT(#{frYear}, '-', LPAD(#{frMonth}, 2, '0')) AND CONCAT(#{toYear}, '-', LPAD(#{toMonth}, 2, '0'))
SELECT A.EMAIL FROM TB_EMAIL AS A WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'
